title: LLM API Call and Streaming Response
interaction_flow: Caller → BaseSession.ask(prompt, stream=False): entry point
BaseSession.ask → history.append({role:'user', content:[{type:'text',text:prompt}]})
BaseSession.ask → trim_messages_history(history, context_win)
trim_messages_history → compress_history_tags(history): runs every 5 calls; truncates <thinking>/<tool_use>/<tool_result>/<history>/<key_info> tags in older messages (_trunc / _trunc_str helpers)
trim_messages_history [if cost > context_win*3]: compress_history_tags(history, keep_recent=4, force=True) + pop oldest messages
trim_messages_history [after pop, if leading msg is user]: _sanitize_leading_user_msg(history[0]) — rewrites orphan tool_result blocks to plain text
BaseSession.ask → LLMSession.make_messages(history): calls _msgs_claude2oai() to convert Claude-format history to OAI format
BaseSession.ask → LLMSession.raw_ask(messages): generator delegation
LLMSession.raw_ask → _openai_stream(api_base, api_key, messages, model, api_mode, temperature, reasoning_effort, max_tokens, max_retries, timeouts, proxies)
_openai_stream [api_mode='responses']: url=auto_make_url(api_base,'responses'), payload={model, input:_to_responses_input(messages), stream:True, prompt_cache_key, tools?}

_openai_stream [api_mode='chat_completions']: url=auto_make_url(api_base,'chat/completions'), _stamp_oai_cache_markers(messages,model), payload={model, messages, stream:True, stream_options:{include_usage:True}, temperature?, max_tokens?, tools?}
_openai_stream → requests.post(url, headers={Authorization:Bearer, Content-Type, Accept:text/event-stream}, json=payload, stream=True, timeout=(connect_timeout,read_timeout), proxies=proxies)
_openai_stream [HTTP >=400]: if status in RETRYABLE(408,409,425,429,500-504) and not streamed → sleep+retry with exponential backoff; else raise HTTPError with err_body
_openai_stream [HTTP 200]: gen = _parse_openai_sse(r.iter_lines(), api_mode) — starts SSE parsing
_openai_stream → yield loop: while True: yield next(gen) [propagates text chunks to caller]
_openai_stream [StopIteration from gen]: return e.value (list[content_block])
_parse_openai_sse [chat_completions mode]: for each SSE line → parse JSON evt → if delta.content: yield text chunk; if delta.tool_calls: accumulate tc_buf[index]={id,name,args}
_parse_openai_sse [responses mode]: handle response.output_text.delta (yield text), response.output_item.added (new function_call → fc_buf), response.function_call_arguments.delta (accumulate args)
_parse_openai_sse [on DONE/response.completed]: assemble blocks=[{type:'text',text:content_text}] + [{type:'tool_use',id,name,input:json.loads(args)} for each tc_buf/fc_buf entry]; return blocks
BaseSession.ask [receives content_blocks via StopIteration.value]
BaseSession.ask [tool_use detection]: for block in content_blocks if block.type=='tool_use': yield '<tool_use>'+json.dumps({name,arguments})+</tool_use>
BaseSession.ask [if no error]: history.append({role:'assistant', content:[{type:'text',text:content}]})
BaseSession.ask → Caller: yields text chunks + optional <tool_use>JSON</tool_use> strings; or returns joined string if stream=False
key_relationships: LLMSession extends BaseSession (inherits ask, history, lock, context_win)
BaseSession.ask delegates raw_ask to LLMSession.raw_ask (generator protocol)
LLMSession.make_messages calls _msgs_claude2oai to convert history format
_openai_stream calls _parse_openai_sse as inner generator for SSE parsing
MockResponse wraps assembled content_blocks (thinking, content, tool_calls, stop_reason)
important_notes: LLMSession.raw_ask is a generator function (uses 'yield from'); return value = list[content_block] passed via StopIteration.value
compress_history_tags uses a call-count modulo 5 throttle (_cd counter); force=True resets it
_trunc() strips <history>/<key_info> blocks entirely and truncates <thinking>/<tool_use>/<tool_result> to max_len=800 chars
_sanitize_leading_user_msg converts orphan tool_result blocks to plain text to avoid API validation errors
Tool-use detection has two layers: native content_block from SSE parser (primary) + _parse_text_tool_calls fallback for text-encoded <tool_use> tags
OAI-compat relay for 'responses' api_mode uses different endpoint (/responses) and input format (_to_responses_input), and flattens tool definitions
Retry logic: exponential backoff (1.5^n*2, max 30s), respects Retry-After header; only retries if streaming has NOT started
Cache markers: _stamp_oai_cache_markers adds cache_control to last 2 user messages for Claude models served via OAI relay
